system.powerDescription:
You weave an object within range of up to CAT size into your own grace. As part of an action you may instantly cause the object to vanish from wherever it may be and appear in one of your hands. If it would be too large for this, such as a car, it'll instead appear in front of your body. This will fail if there is physically not enough space for the object to coalesce. When the object is transported it retains any damage it suffered prior. 

Gain or grant +1D when you or an ally next take advantage of this power. This power may alter the parameters of rolls whilst active.
